result.stdout:
GiTime - Analyze your git commit activity across repositories

Usage:
  gitime [options]

Options:
  --add-repo <path>      Add a repository (absolute or relative path)
  --remove-repo <path>   Remove a repository (absolute or relative path)
  --list-repos           List all configured repositories
  --show-config          Show current configuration
  --from <date>          Start date for analysis (YYYY-MM-DD)
  --to <date>            End date for analysis (YYYY-MM-DD)
  -v, --verbose          Show individual commit details
  --html                 Generate HTML report (auto-opens in browser)
  --version              Show version information
  --help, -h             Show this help message

Without options, analyzes the previous calendar month
Tip: Use '.' to add the current directory
